# personas

Swappable output-style personalities — terse staff engineer, deep staff engineer, pair programmer, thinking partner, and ship-it.

## CLAUDE.md Template

Copy the following into your project's `CLAUDE.md` to reference this plugin:

```
# Project Name

## Plugins

This project uses the personas plugin for Claude Code configuration.

## Methodology

See plugin documentation for TDD, root cause tracing, and subagent development processes.
```
